name: oracle-critic
description: Stage-first read-only second-opinion critic recipe: independent critique and skeptical verification followed by evidence-first triage for the runtime task.

tasks.prompt: Act as a read-only Oracle/Critic second opinion for the target described in the runtime task. Do not modify files. Do not treat your own opinion as truth; every claim must cite evidence from files you inspected. Return Markdown with sections: Confirmed findings, Uncertain or needs-human-check, No-action observations. Each confirmed finding must include severity, evidence file path(s), realistic impact, and a concrete next action.

Independently verify or refute likely risks for the target described in the runtime task. Be skeptical. Prefer falsifying over inventing findings. Do not modify files. Record missing evidence and uncertainty explicitly. Return Markdown with sections: Verified concerns, Refuted concerns, Insufficient evidence.

stages.prompt: Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, deduplicate the critic and verifier outputs into an evidence-first triage. Do not modify files. Treat critic/verifier outputs as claims to check, not ground truth. Return Markdown with: Confirmed action items, Needs human decision, Deferred/non-action, and Evidence index. Preserve file paths and uncertainty.
